42/**
43 * @method static \Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Builder search()
44 *
45 * @property \App\Models\Instance\SpecialDate|null $birthdate
46 */
47class Contact extends Model
48{
49    use Searchable, SoftDeletes, Prunable, HasUuid;
50
51    /** @var array<string> */
52    protected $dates = [
53        'last_talked_to',
54        'last_consulted_at',
55        'stay_in_touch_trigger_date',
56        'created_at',
57        'updated_at',
58    ];
59
60    /**
61     * The list of columns we want the Searchable trait to use.
62     *
63     * @var array<string>
64     */
65    protected $searchable_columns = [
66        'first_name',
67        'middle_name',
68        'last_name',
69        'nickname',
70        'description',
71        'job',
72    ];
73
74    /**
75     * The list of columns we want the Searchable trait to select.
76     *
77     * @var array<string>
78     */
79    protected $return_from_search = [
80        'id',
81        'uuid',
82        'first_name',
83        'middle_name',
84        'last_name',
85        'nickname',
86        'description',
87        'gender_id',
88        'account_id',
89        'created_at',
90        'updated_at',
91        'is_partial',
92        'is_starred',
93        'avatar_source',
94        'avatar_adorable_uuid',
95        'avatar_gravatar_url',
96        'avatar_default_url',
97        'avatar_photo_id',
98        'default_avatar_color',
99    ];
100
101    /**
102     * The attributes that are mass assignable.
103     *
104     * @var array<string>
105     */
106    protected $fillable = [
107        'uuid',
108        'first_name',
109        'middle_name',
110        'last_name',
111        'nickname',
112        'gender_id',
113        'description',
114        'account_id',
115        'is_partial',
116        'job',
117        'company',
118        'food_preferences',
119        'birthday_reminder_id',
120        'birthday_special_date_id',
121        'is_dead',
122        'last_consulted_at',
123        'created_at',
124        'first_met_additional_info',
125        'address_book_id',
126        'vcard',
127        'avatar_gravatar_url',
128        'avatar_source',
129    ];
130
131    /**
132     * The attributes that aren't mass assignable.
133     *
134     * @var array<string>|bool
135     */
136    protected $guarded = ['id'];
137
138    /**
139     * Eager load account with every contact.
140     *
141     * @var array<string>
142     */
143    protected $with = [
144        'account',
145        'avatarPhoto',
146        'gender',
147    ];
148
149    /**
150     * The attributes that should be cast to native types.
151     *
152     * @var array<string, string>
153     */
154    protected $casts = [
155        'is_partial' => 'boolean',
156        'is_dead' => 'boolean',
157        'has_avatar' => 'boolean',
158        'is_starred' => 'boolean',
159        'is_active' => 'boolean',
160        'stay_in_touch_frequency' => 'integer',
161    ];
162
163    /**
164     * The name order attribute that indicates how to format the name of the
165     * contact.
166     *
167     * @var string
168     */
169    protected $nameOrder = 'firstname_lastname';
170
171    /**
172     * Get the user associated with the contact.
173     *
174     * @return BelongsTo
175     */
176    public function account()
177    {
178        return $this->belongsTo(Account::class);
179    }
180
181    /**
182     * Get the address book associated with the contact.
183     *
184     * @return BelongsTo
185     */
186    public function addressBook()
187    {
188        return $this->belongsTo(AddressBook::class);
189    }
190
191    /**
192     * Get the list of contacts from the same address book as this contact.
193     *
194     * @return HasMany<self>|null
195     */
196    public function siblingContacts(): ?HasMany
197    {
198        if ($this->account) {
199            if ($this->addressBook) {
200                return $this->account->contacts($this->addressBook->name);
201            }
202
203            return $this->account->contacts();
204        }
205
206        return null;
207    }
208
209    /**
210     * Get the gender of the contact.
211     *
212     * @return BelongsTo
213     */
214    public function gender()
215    {
216        return $this->belongsTo(Gender::class);
217    }
218
219    /**
220     * Get the activity records associated with the contact.
221     *
222     * @return BelongsToMany
223     */
224    public function activities()
225    {
226        return $this->belongsToMany(Activity::class)->orderBy('happened_at', 'desc');
227    }
228
229    /**
230     * Get the activity records associated with the contact.
231     *
232     * @return HasMany
233     */
234    public function activityStatistics()
235    {
236        return $this->hasMany(ActivityStatistic::class)->orderBy('year', 'desc');
237    }
238
239    /**
240     * Get the debt records associated with the contact.
241     *
242     * @return HasMany
243     */
244    public function debts()
245    {
246        return $this->hasMany(Debt::class);
247    }
248
249    /**
250     * Get the gift records associated with the contact.
251     *
252     * @return HasMany
253     */
254    public function gifts()
255    {
256        return $this->hasMany(Gift::class);
257    }
258
259    /**
260     * Get the note records associated with the contact.
261     *
262     * @return HasMany
263     */
264    public function notes()
265    {
266        return $this->hasMany(Note::class);
267    }
268
269    /**
270     * Get the reminder records associated with the contact.
271     *
272     * @return HasMany
273     */
274    public function reminders()
275    {
276        return $this->hasMany(Reminder::class);
277    }
278
279    /**
280     * Get the task records associated with the contact.
281     *
282     * @return HasMany
283     */
284    public function tasks()
285    {
286        return $this->hasMany(Task::class);
287    }
288
289    /**
290     * Get the tags records associated with the contact.
291     *
292     * @return BelongsToMany
293     */
294    public function tags()
295    {
296        return $this->belongsToMany(Tag::class)->withPivot('account_id')->withTimestamps();
297    }
298
299    /**
300     * Get the calls records associated with the contact.
301     *
302     * @return HasMany
303     */
304    public function calls()
305    {
306        return $this->hasMany(Call::class)->orderBy('called_at', 'desc');
307    }
308
309    /**
310     * Get the entries records associated with the contact.

312     * @return HasMany
313     */
314    public function entries()
315    {
316        return $this->hasMany(Entry::class);
317    }

322     * @return HasMany
323     */
324    public function relationships()
325    {
326        return $this->hasMany(Relationship::class, 'contact_is');
327    }

329    /**

337    }

339    /**

344    public function addresses()

347    }

352     * @return HasMany
353     */
354    public function pets()
355    {
356        return $this->hasMany(Pet::class);
357    }

359    /**
360     * Get the contact records associated with the account.
361     *
362     * @return HasMany
363     */
364    public function specialDates()
365    {
366        return $this->hasMany(SpecialDate::class);
367    }
368
369    /**
370     * Get the Special date represented the birthdate.
371     *
372     * @return HasOne
373     */
374    public function birthdate()
375    {
376        return $this->hasOne(SpecialDate::class, 'id', 'birthday_special_date_id');
377    }

380     * Get the Special date represented the deceased date.
381     *
382     * @return HasOne
383     */
384    public function deceasedDate()
385    {
386        return $this->hasOne(SpecialDate::class, 'id', 'deceased_special_date_id');
387    }
388
389    /**
390     * Get the Special date represented the date first met.
391     *
392     * @return HasOne
393     */
394    public function firstMetDate()
395    {
396        return $this->hasOne(SpecialDate::class, 'id', 'first_met_special_date_id');
397    }

403     */
404    public function conversations()
405    {
406        return $this->hasMany(Conversation::class)->orderBy('conversations.happened_at', 'desc');
407    }

416        return $this->hasMany(Message::class);
417    }

421     *
422     * @return HasMany
423     */
424    public function documents()
425    {
426        return $this->hasMany(Document::class);
427    }

433     */
434    public function photos()
435    {
436        return $this->belongsToMany(Photo::class)->withTimestamps();
437    }

443     */
444    public function lifeEvents()

447    }

455    {
456        return $this->hasMany(Occupation::class);
457    }

467    }

479    /**
480     * Test if this is the 'me' contact.
481     *
482     * @return bool
483     */
484    public function isMe()
485    {
486        return $this->id == auth()->user()->me_contact_id;
487    }
488
489    /**
490     * Sort the contacts according a given criteria.
491     *
492     * @param  Builder  $builder
493     * @param  string  $criteria
494     * @return Builder
495     */
496    public function scopeSortedBy(Builder $builder, string $criteria): Builder
497    {
498        switch ($criteria) {
499            case 'firstnameAZ':
500                return $builder->orderBy('first_name');
501            case 'firstnameZA':
502                return $builder->orderByDesc('first_name');
503            case 'lastnameAZ':
504                return $builder->orderBy('last_name');
505            case 'lastnameZA':
506                return $builder->orderByDesc('last_name');
507            case 'lastactivitydateNewtoOld':
508                return $this->sortedByLastActivity($builder, 'desc');
509            case 'lastactivitydateOldtoNew':
510                return $this->sortedByLastActivity($builder, 'asc');
511            default:
512                return $builder;
513        }
514    }
515
516    /**
517     * Sort the contacts using last activity.
518     *
519     * @param  Builder  $builder
520     * @param  string  $order
521     * @return Builder
522     */
523    private function sortedByLastActivity(Builder $builder, string $order): Builder
524    {
525        $builder->leftJoin('activity_contact', 'contacts.id', '=', 'activity_contact.contact_id');
526        $builder->leftJoin('activities', 'activity_contact.activity_id', '=', 'activities.id');
527        $builder->groupBy('contacts.id');
528        $builder->orderBy('activities.happened_at', $order);
529        $builder->select(['*', 'contacts.id as id']);
530
531        return $builder;
532    }
533
534    /**
535     * Scope a query to only include contacts who are not only a kid or a
536     * significant other without being a contact.
537     *
538     * @param  Builder  $query
539     * @return Builder
540     */
541    public function scopeReal($query)
542    {
543        return $query->where('is_partial', 0);
544    }
545
546    /**
547     * Scope a query to only include contacts who are active.
548     *
549     * @param  Builder  $query
550     * @return Builder
551     */
552    public function scopeActive($query)
553    {
554        return $query->where('is_active', 1);
555    }
556
557    /**
558     * Scope a query to only include contacts who are alive.
559     *
560     * @param  Builder  $query
561     * @return Builder
562     */
563    public function scopeAlive($query)
564    {
565        return $query->where('is_dead', 0);
566    }
567
568    /**
569     * Scope a query to only include contacts who are dead.
570     *
571     * @param  Builder  $query
572     * @return Builder
573     */
574    public function scopeDead($query)
575    {
576        return $query->where('is_dead', 1);
577    }
578
579    /**
580     * Scope a query to only include contacts who are not active.
581     *
582     * @param  Builder  $query
583     * @return Builder
584     */
585    public function scopeNotActive($query)
586    {
587        return $query->where('is_active', 0);
588    }
589
590    /**
591     * Scope a query to include contacts whose notes contain the search phrase.
592     *
593     * @param  Builder  $query
594     * @return Builder
595     */
596    public function scopeNotes($query, int $accountId = null, string $needle)
597    {
598        $maccountId = $accountId ?? Auth::user()->account_id;
599
600        return $query->orWhereHas('notes', function ($query) use ($maccountId, $needle) {
601            return $query->where([
602                ['account_id', $maccountId],
603                ['body', 'like', "%$needle%"],
604            ]);
605        });
606    }
607
608    /**
609     * Scope a query to include contacts whose introduction notes contain the search phrase.
610     *
611     * @param  Builder  $query
612     * @return Builder
613     */
614    public function scopeIntroductionAdditionalInformation($query, int $accountId = null, string $needle)
615    {
616        $maccountId = $accountId ?? Auth::user()->account_id;
617
618        return $query->orWhere([
619            ['account_id', $maccountId],
620            ['first_met_additional_info', 'like', "%$needle%"],
621        ]);
622    }
623
624    /**
625     * Scope a query to only include contacts from given address book.
626     * 'null' value for address book is the default address book.
627     *
628     * @param  Builder  $query
629     * @param  int|null  $accountId
630     * @param  string|null  $addressBookName
631     * @return Builder
632     */
633    public function scopeAddressBook($query, int $accountId = null, string $addressBookName = null)
634    {
635        $addressBook = null;
636        if ($accountId && $addressBookName) {
637            $addressBook = AddressBook::where([
638                'account_id' => $accountId,
639                'name' => $addressBookName,
640            ])->first();
641        }
642
643        return $query->where('address_book_id', $addressBook ? $addressBook->id : null);
644    }
645
646    /**
647     * Get contacts ordered by user preferences.
648     *
649     * @param  Builder  $query
650     * @return Builder
651     */
652    public function scopeOrderByUserPreference(Builder $query): Builder
653    {
654        switch (Auth::user()->name_order) {
655            case 'firstname_lastname':
656                $query = $query->orderBy('first_name')
657                    ->orderBy('last_name');
658                break;
659            case 'firstname_lastname_nickname':
660                $query = $query->orderBy('first_name')
661                    ->orderBy('last_name')
662                    ->orderBy('nickname');
663                break;
664            case 'firstname_nickname_lastname':
665                $query = $query->orderBy('first_name')
666                    ->orderBy('nickname')
667                    ->orderBy('last_name');
668                break;
669            case 'nickname':
670                $query = $query->orderBy('nickname');
671                break;
672            case 'lastname_firstname':
673                $query = $query->orderBy('last_name')
674                    ->orderby('first_name');
675                break;
676            case 'lastname_firstname_nickname':
677                $query = $query->orderBy('last_name')
678                    ->orderby('first_name')
679                    ->orderby('nickname');
680                break;
681            case 'lastname_nickname_firstname':
682                $query = $query->orderBy('last_name')
683                    ->orderby('nickname')
684                    ->orderby('first_name');
685                break;
686        }
687
688        return $query;
689    }
690
691    /**
692     * Mutator first_name.
693     * Get the first name of the contact.
694     *
695     * @param  string|null  $value
696     */
697    public function setFirstNameAttribute($value)
698    {
699        $this->attributes['first_name'] = trim($value);
700    }
701
702    /**
703     * Mutator last_name.
704     *
705     * It doesn't run ucfirst on purpose.
706     *
707     * @param  string|null  $value
708     */
709    public function setLastNameAttribute($value)
710    {
711        $value = $value ? trim($value) : null;
712        $this->attributes['last_name'] = $value;
713    }
714
715    /**
716     * Set the name order attribute.
717     *
718     * @param  string  $value
719     * @return void
720     */
721    public function nameOrder($value)
722    {
723        $this->nameOrder = $value;
724    }
725
726    /**
727     * Mutator last_name.
728     *
729     * @param  string|null  $value
730     */
731    public function setNicknameAttribute($value)
732    {
733        $value = $value ? trim($value) : null;
734        $this->attributes['nickname'] = $value;
735    }
736
737    /**
738     * Get user's initials.
739     *
740     * @return string
741     */
742    public function getInitialsAttribute()
743    {
744        $name = Str::ascii($this->name, LocaleHelper::getLang());
745        preg_match_all('/(?<=\s|^)[a-zA-Z0-9]/i', $name, $initials);
746
747        return implode('', $initials[0]);
748    }
749
750    /**
751     * Get the full name of the contact.
752     *
753     * @return string
754     */
755    public function getNameAttribute()
756    {
757        $completeName = '';
758
759        if (Auth::check()) {
760            $this->nameOrder = auth()->user()->name_order;
761        }
762
763        switch ($this->nameOrder) {
764            case 'firstname_lastname':
765                $completeName = $this->first_name;
766
767                if (! is_null($this->middle_name)) {
768                    $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->middle_name;
769                }
770
771                if (! is_null($this->last_name)) {
772                    $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->last_name;
773                }
774                break;
775            case 'lastname_firstname':
776                $completeName = '';
777                if (! is_null($this->last_name)) {
778                    $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->last_name;
779                }
780
781                if (! is_null($this->middle_name)) {
782                    $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->middle_name;
783                }
784
785                $completeName .= ' '.$this->first_name;
786                break;
787            case 'firstname_lastname_nickname':
788                $completeName = $this->first_name;
789
790                if (! is_null($this->middle_name)) {
791                    $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->middle_name;
792                }
793
794                if (! is_null($this->last_name)) {
795                    $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->last_name;
796                }
797
798                if (! is_null($this->nickname)) {
799                    $completeName = $completeName.' ('.$this->nickname.')';
800                }
801                break;
802            case 'firstname_nickname_lastname':
803                $completeName = $this->first_name;
804
805                if (! is_null($this->middle_name)) {
806                    $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->middle_name;
807                }
808
809                if (! is_null($this->nickname)) {
810                    $completeName = $completeName.' ('.$this->nickname.')';
811                }
812
813                if (! is_null($this->last_name)) {
814                    $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->last_name;
815                }
816
817                break;
818            case 'lastname_firstname_nickname':
819                $completeName = '';
820                if (! is_null($this->last_name)) {
821                    $completeName = $this->last_name;
822                }
823
824                $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->first_name;
825
826                if (! is_null($this->middle_name)) {
827                    $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->middle_name;
828                }
829
830                if (! is_null($this->nickname)) {
831                    $completeName = $completeName.' ('.$this->nickname.')';
832                }
833                break;
834            case 'nickname_firstname_lastname':
835                $completeName = $this->first_name;
836
837                if (! is_null($this->middle_name)) {
838                    $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->middle_name;
839                }
840
841                if (! is_null($this->last_name)) {
842                    $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->last_name;
843                }
844
845                if (! is_null($this->nickname)) {
846                    $completeName = $this->nickname.' ('.$completeName.')';
847                }
848                break;
849            case 'nickname_lastname_firstname':
850                $completeName = '';
851                if (! is_null($this->last_name)) {
852                    $completeName = $this->last_name.' ';
853                }
854
855                $completeName = $completeName.$this->first_name;
856
857                if (! is_null($this->middle_name)) {
858                    $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->middle_name;
859                }
860
861                if (! is_null($this->nickname)) {
862                    $completeName = $this->nickname.' ('.$completeName.')';
863                }
864                break;
865            case 'lastname_nickname_firstname':
866                $completeName = '';
867                if (! is_null($this->last_name)) {
868                    $completeName = $this->last_name;
869                }
870
871                if (! is_null($this->nickname)) {
872                    $completeName = $completeName.' ('.$this->nickname.')';
873                }
874
875                $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->first_name;
876
877                if (! is_null($this->middle_name)) {
878                    $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->middle_name;
879                }
880                break;
881            case 'nickname_bracketed_firstname_lastname':
882                $completeName = $this->first_name;
883
884                if (! is_null($this->middle_name)) {
885                    $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->middle_name;
886                }
887
888                if (! is_null($this->nickname)) {
889                    $completeName = $this->nickname.' ('.$completeName.')';
890                }
891
892                if (! is_null($this->last_name)) {
893                    $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->last_name;
894                }
895                break;
896            case 'nickname':
897                if (! is_null($this->nickname)) {
898                    $completeName = $this->nickname;
899                }
900
901                if ($completeName == '') {
902                    $completeName = $this->first_name;
903
904                    if (! is_null($this->last_name)) {
905                        $completeName = $completeName.' '.$this->last_name;
906                    }
907                }
908                break;
909        }
910
911        if ($this->is_dead) {
912            $completeName .= ' ⚰';
913        }
914
915        return trim($completeName);
916    }
917
918    /**
919     * Get the incomplete name of the contact, like `John D.`.
920     *
921     * @return string
922     */
923    public function getIncompleteName()
924    {
925        $incompleteName = '';
926        $incompleteName = $this->first_name;
927
928        if ($this->nameOrder == 'nickname_bracketed_firstname_lastname' && ! is_null($this->nickname)) {
929            $incompleteName = $this->nickname;
930        }
931
932        if (! is_null($this->last_name)) {
933            $incompleteName .= ' '.mb_substr($this->last_name, 0, 1);
934        }
935
936        if ($this->is_dead) {
937            $incompleteName .= ' ⚰';
938        }
939
940        return trim($incompleteName);
941    }
942
943    /**
944     * Get the initials of the contact, used for avatars.
945     *
946     * @return string
947     */
948    public function getInitials()
949    {
950        return $this->initials;
951    }
952
953    /**
954     * Get the date of the last activity done by this contact.
955     *
956     * @return \DateTime|null
957     */
958    public function getLastActivityDate(): ?DateTime
959    {
960        if ($this->activities->count() === 0) {
961            return null;
962        }
963
964        $lastActivity = $this->activities->sortByDesc('happened_at')->first();
965
966        return $lastActivity->happened_at;
967    }
968
969    /**
970     * Get all the contacts related to the current contact by a specific
971     * relationship type group.
972     *
973     * @param  string  $type
974     * @return Collection|null
975     */
976    public function getRelationshipsByRelationshipTypeGroup(string $type): ?Collection
977    {
978        $relationshipTypeGroup = $this->account->getRelationshipTypeGroupByType($type);
979
980        if (! $relationshipTypeGroup) {
981            return null;
982        }
983
984        return $this->relationships->filter(function ($item) use ($type) {
985            return $item->relationshipType->relationshipTypeGroup->name == $type;
986        });
987    }
988
989    /**
990     * Set the default avatar color for this object.
991     *
992     * @param  string|null  $color
993     * @return void
994     */
995    public function setAvatarColor($color = null)
996    {
997        $colors = [
998            '#fdb660',
999            '#93521e',
1000            '#bd5067',
1001            '#b3d5fe',
1002            '#ff9807',
1003            '#709512',
1004            '#5f479a',
1005            '#e5e5cd',
1006        ];
1007
1008        $this->default_avatar_color = $color ?? $colors[mt_rand(0, count($colors) - 1)];
1009    }
1010
1011    /**
1012     * Set the name of the contact.
1013     *
1014     * @param  string  $firstName
1015     * @param  string  $middleName
1016     * @param  string  $lastName
1017     * @return bool
1018     */
1019    public function setName(string $firstName, string $lastName = null, string $middleName = null)
1020    {
1021        if ($firstName === '') {
1022            return false;
1023        }
1024
1025        $this->first_name = $firstName;
1026        $this->middle_name = $middleName;
1027        $this->last_name = $lastName;
1028
1029        return true;
1030    }
1031
1032    /**
1033     * Returns the state of the birthday.
1034     * As it's a Special Date, the date can have several states. We need this
1035     * info when we populate the Edit contact sheet.
1036     *
1037     * @return string
1038     */
1039    public function getBirthdayState()
1040    {
1041        if (! $this->birthday_special_date_id) {
1042            return 'unknown';
1043        }
1044
1045        if ($this->birthdate->is_age_based) {
1046            return 'approximate';
1047        }
1048
1049        // we know at least the day and month
1050        if ($this->birthdate->is_year_unknown) {
1051            return 'almost';
1052        }
1053
1054        return 'exact';
1055    }
1056
1057    /**
1058     * Refresh statistics about activities.
1059     *
1060     * @return void
1061     */
1062    public function calculateActivitiesStatistics()
1063    {
1064        // Delete the Activities statistics table for this contact
1065        $this->activityStatistics->each(function ($activityStatistic) {
1066            $activityStatistic->delete();
1067        });
1068
1069        // Create the statistics again
1070        $this->activities->groupBy('happened_at.year')
1071            ->map(function (Collection $activities, $year) {
1072                ActivityStatistic::create([
1073                    'account_id' => $this->account_id,
1074                    'contact_id' => $this->id,
1075                    'year' => $year,
1076                    'count' => $activities->count(),
1077                ]);
1078            });
1079    }
1080
1081    /**
1082     * Get all the gifts offered, if any.
1083     */
1084    public function getGiftsOffered()
1085    {
1086        return $this->gifts()->offered()->get();
1087    }
1088
1089    /**
1090     * Get all the gift ideas, if any.
1091     */
1092    public function getGiftIdeas()
1093    {
1094        return $this->gifts()->isIdea()->get();
1095    }
1096
1097    /**
1098     * Get all the tasks in the in progress state, if any.
1099     */
1100    public function getTasksInProgress()
1101    {
1102        return $this->tasks()->inProgress()->get();
1103    }
1104
1105    /**
1106     * Get all the tasks in the in completed state, if any.
1107     */
1108    public function getCompletedTasks()
1109    {
1110        return $this->tasks()->completed()->get();
1111    }
1112
1113    /**
1114     * Get the default avatar URL.
1115     *
1116     * @return string
1117     */
1118    public function getAvatarDefaultURL()
1119    {
1120        if (empty($this->avatar_default_url)) {
1121            return '';
1122        }
1123
1124        if (config('filesystems.default_visibility') === 'public') {
1125            $matches = Str::of($this->avatar_default_url)->split('/\?/');
1126
1127            $url = asset(StorageHelper::disk(config('filesystems.default'))->url($matches[0]));
1128            if ($matches->count() > 1) {
1129                $url .= '?'.$matches[1];
1130            }
1131
1132            return $url;
1133        }
1134
1135        return route('storage', ['file' => $this->avatar_default_url]);
1136    }
1137
1138    /**
1139     * Get the adorable avatar URL.
1140     *
1141     * @param  string|null  $value
1142     * @return string|null
1143     */
1144    public function getAvatarAdorableDataUrlAttribute(?string $value): ?string
1145    {
1146        if (isset($this->avatar_adorable_uuid) && $this->avatar_adorable_uuid !== '') {
1147            return LaravelAdorable::get(config('monica.avatar_size'), $this->avatar_adorable_uuid);
1148        }
1149
1150        return null;
1151    }
1152
1153    /**
1154     * Returns the URL of the avatar, properly sized.
1155     * The avatar can come from 4 sources:
1156     *  - default,
1157     *  - Adorable avatar,
1158     *  - Gravatar
1159     *  - or a photo that has been uploaded.
1160     *
1161     * @return string|null
1162     */
1163    public function getAvatarURL()
1164    {
1165        $avatarURL = '';
1166
1167        switch ($this->avatar_source) {
1168            case 'adorable':
1169                $avatarURL = $this->avatar_adorable_data_url;
1170                break;
1171            case 'gravatar':
1172                $avatarURL = $this->avatar_gravatar_url;
1173                break;
1174            case 'photo':
1175                if ($this->avatarPhoto) {
1176                    $avatarURL = $this->avatarPhoto()->first()->url();
1177                } else {
1178                    $avatarURL = $this->getAvatarDefaultURL();
1179                }
1180                break;
1181            case 'default':
1182            default:
1183                $avatarURL = $this->getAvatarDefaultURL();
1184                break;
1185        }
1186
1187        return $avatarURL;
1188    }
1189
1190    /**
1191     * Delete avatars files.
1192     * This does not touch avatar_location or avatar_file_name properties of the contact.
1193     *
1194     * @param  bool  $force
1195     */
1196    public function deleteAvatars(bool $force = false)
1197    {
1198        if (! $force && (! $this->has_avatar || $this->avatar_location == 'external')) {
1199            return;
1200        }
1201
1202        $storage = Storage::disk($this->avatar_location);
1203        $this->deleteAvatarSize($storage);
1204        $this->deleteAvatarSize($storage, 110);
1205        $this->deleteAvatarSize($storage, 174);
1206    }
1207
1208    /**
1209     * Delete avatar file for one size.
1210     *
1211     * @param  Filesystem  $storage
1212     * @param  int  $size
1213     */
1214    private function deleteAvatarSize(Filesystem $storage, int $size = null)
1215    {
1216        $avatarFileName = $this->avatar_file_name;
1217
1218        if (! is_null($size)) {
1219            $filename = pathinfo($avatarFileName, PATHINFO_FILENAME);
1220            $extension = pathinfo($avatarFileName, PATHINFO_EXTENSION);
1221            $avatarFileName = 'avatars/'.$filename.'_'.$size.'.'.$extension;
1222        }
1223
1224        try {
1225            if ($storage->exists($avatarFileName)) {
1226                $storage->delete($avatarFileName);
1227            }
1228        } catch (FileNotFoundException $e) {
1229            return;
1230        }
1231    }
1232
1233    /**
1234     * Check if the contact has debt (by the contact or the user for this contact).
1235     *
1236     * @return bool
1237     */
1238    public function hasDebt()
1239    {
1240        return $this->debts()->count() !== 0;
1241    }
1242
1243    /**
1244     * Get the list of tags as a string to populate the tags form.
1245     */
1246    public function getTagsAsString()
1247    {
1248        return $this->tags->map(function (Tag $tag): string {
1249            return $tag->name;
1250        })->join(',');
1251    }
1252
1253    /**
1254     * Is this contact owed money?
1255     *
1256     * @return bool
1257     */
1258    public function isOwedMoney()
1259    {
1260        return $this->totalOutstandingDebtAmount() > 0;
1261    }
1262
1263    /**
1264     * How much is the debt.
1265     *
1266     * @return int amount in storage value
1267     */
1268    public function totalOutstandingDebtAmount(): int
1269    {
1270        return $this
1271            ->debts()
1272            ->inProgress()
1273            ->getResults()
1274            ->filter(fn ($d) => Arr::has($d->attributes, 'amount'))
1275            ->sum(function ($d) {
1276                $amount = $d->attributes['amount'];
1277
1278                return $d->in_debt === 'yes' ? -$amount : $amount;
1279            });
1280    }
1281
1282    /**
1283     * Indicates whether the contact has information about how they first met.
1284     *
1285     * @return bool
1286     */
1287    public function hasFirstMetInformation()
1288    {
1289        return ! is_null($this->first_met_additional_info) || ! is_null($this->firstMetDate) || ! is_null($this->first_met_through_contact_id);
1290    }
1291
1292    /**
1293     * Gets the contact who introduced this person to the user.
1294     *
1295     * @return Contact|null
1296     */
1297    public function getIntroducer(): ?self
1298    {
1299        if (! $this->first_met_through_contact_id) {
1300            return null;
1301        }
1302
1303        try {
1304            /** @var Contact $contact */
1305            $contact = self::where('account_id', $this->account_id)
1306                ->findOrFail($this->first_met_through_contact_id);
1307        } catch (ModelNotFoundException $e) {
1308            return null;
1309        }
1310
1311        return $contact;
1312    }
1313
1314    /**
1315     * Sets a Special Date for this contact, for a specific occasion (birthday,
1316     * decease date,...) of which we know the date.
1317     *
1318     * @param  string  $occasion
1319     * @param  int  $year
1320     * @param  int  $month
1321     * @param  int  $day
1322     * @return SpecialDate|null
1323     */
1324    public function setSpecialDate($occasion, int $year, int $month, int $day): ?SpecialDate
1325    {
1326        if (empty($occasion)) {
1327            return null;
1328        }
1329
1330        $specialDate = new SpecialDate;
1331        $specialDate->setToContact($this)->createFromDate($year, $month, $day);
1332
1333        switch ($occasion) {
1334            case 'birthdate':
1335                $this->birthday_special_date_id = $specialDate->id;
1336                break;
1337            case 'deceased_date':
1338                $this->deceased_special_date_id = $specialDate->id;
1339                break;
1340            case 'first_met':
1341                $this->first_met_special_date_id = $specialDate->id;
1342                break;
1343            default:
1344                break;
1345        }
1346
1347        $this->save();
1348
1349        return $specialDate;
1350    }
1351
1352    /**
1353     * Sets a Special Date for this contact, for a specific occasion (birthday,
1354     * decease date,...) of which we know only the age (meaning it's going to
1355     * be approximate).
1356     */
1357    public function setSpecialDateFromAge($occasion, int $age)
1358    {
1359        if (is_null($occasion)) {
1360            return;
1361        }
1362
1363        $specialDate = new SpecialDate;
1364        $specialDate->setToContact($this)->createFromAge($age);
1365
1366        switch ($occasion) {
1367            case 'birthdate':
1368                $this->birthday_special_date_id = $specialDate->id;
1369                break;
1370            case 'deceased_date':
1371                $this->deceased_special_date_id = $specialDate->id;
1372                break;
1373            case 'first_met':
1374                $this->first_met_special_date_id = $specialDate->id;
1375                break;
1376            default:
1377                break;
1378        }
1379
1380        $this->save();
1381
1382        return $specialDate;
1383    }
1384
1385    /**
1386     * Get all the reminders regarding the birthdays of the contacts who have a
1387     * relationships with the current contact.
1388     *
1389     * @return Collection
1390     */
1391    public function getBirthdayRemindersAboutRelatedContacts()
1392    {
1393        $relationships = $this->relationships->filter(function ($item) {
1394            return ! is_null($item->ofContact) &&
1395                   $item->ofContact->birthday_special_date_id > 0;
1396        });
1397
1398        $reminders = collect();
1399        foreach ($relationships as $relationship) {
1400            $reminder = Reminder::where('account_id', $this->account_id)
1401                ->find($relationship->ofContact->birthday_reminder_id);
1402
1403            if ($reminder) {
1404                $reminders->push($reminder);
1405            }
1406        }
1407
1408        return $reminders;
1409    }
1410
1411    /**
1412     * Gets the first contact related to this contact if the current contact is
1413     * partial.
1414     *
1415     * @return self|null
1416     */
1417    public function getRelatedRealContact()
1418    {
1419        $contact = $this;
1420
1421        return self::setEagerLoads([])->where('account_id', $this->account_id)
1422            ->where('id', function ($query) use ($contact) {
1423                $query->select('of_contact')
1424                        ->from('relationships')
1425                        ->where([
1426                            'account_id' => $contact->account_id,
1427                            'contact_is' => $contact->id,
1428                        ])
1429                        ->first();
1430            })
1431            ->first();
1432    }
1433
1434    /**
1435     * Get the link to this contact, or the related real contact.
1436     *
1437     * @return string
1438     */
1439    public function getLink()
1440    {
1441        $contact = $this->is_partial ? $this->getRelatedRealContact() : $this;
1442        if (is_null($contact)) {
1443            $contact = $this;
1444        }
1445
1446        return route('people.show', $contact);
1447    }
1448
1449    /**
1450     * Get the contacts that have all the provided $tags
1451     * or if $tags is NONE get contacts that have no tags.
1452     *
1453     * @param  Builder  $query
1454     * @param  mixed  $tags  string or Tag
1455     * @return Builder $query
1456     */
1457    public function scopeTags($query, $tags)
1458    {
1459        if ($tags == 'NONE') {
1460            // get tagless contacts
1461            $query = $query->has('tags', '<', 1);
1462        } elseif (! empty($tags)) {
1463            // gets users who have all the tags
1464            foreach ($tags as $tag) {
1465                $query = $query->whereHas('tags', function (Builder $query) use ($tag) {
1466                    $query->where('id', $tag->id);
1467                });
1468            }
1469        }
1470
1471        return $query;
1472    }
1473
1474    /**
1475     * Indicates the age of the contact at death.
1476     *
1477     * @return int|null
1478     */
1479    public function getAgeAtDeath(): ?int
1480    {
1481        if (! $this->deceasedDate) {
1482            return null;
1483        }
1484
1485        if ($this->deceasedDate->is_year_unknown == 1) {
1486            return null;
1487        }
1488
1489        if (! $this->birthdate) {
1490            return null;
1491        }
1492
1493        return $this->birthdate->date->diffInYears($this->deceasedDate->date);
1494    }
1495
1496    /**
1497     * Update the frequency for which user has to be warned to stay in touch
1498     * with the contact.
1499     *
1500     * @param  int  $frequency
1501     * @return bool
1502     */
1503    public function updateStayInTouchFrequency($frequency)
1504    {
1505        if (! is_int($frequency)) {
1506            return false;
1507        }
1508
1509        $this->stay_in_touch_frequency = $frequency;
1510
1511        if ($frequency == 0) {
1512            $this->stay_in_touch_frequency = null;
1513        }
1514
1515        $this->save();
1516
1517        return true;
1518    }
1519
1520    /**
1521     * Update the date the notification about staying in touch should be sent.
1522     *
1523     * @param  int  $frequency
1524     * @param  Carbon|null  $triggerDate
1525     */
1526    public function setStayInTouchTriggerDate($frequency, $triggerDate = null)
1527    {
1528        // prevent timestamp update
1529        $timestamps = $this->timestamps;
1530        $this->timestamps = false;
1531
1532        if ($frequency === 0) {
1533            $this->stay_in_touch_trigger_date = null;
1534        } else {
1535            $triggerDate = $triggerDate ?? now();
1536            $newTriggerDate = $triggerDate->addDays($frequency);
1537            $this->stay_in_touch_trigger_date = $newTriggerDate;
1538        }
1539
1540        $this->save();
1541
1542        $this->timestamps = $timestamps;
1543    }
1544
1545    /**
1546     * Get the weather information for this contact, based on the first address
1547     * on the profile.
1548     *
1549     * @return Weather|null
1550     */
1551    public function getWeather(): ?Weather
1552    {
1553        return WeatherHelper::getWeatherForAddress($this->addresses()->first());
1554    }
1555
1556    public function updateConsulted()
1557    {
1558        // prevent timestamp update
1559        $timestamps = $this->timestamps;
1560        $this->timestamps = false;
1561
1562        $this->last_consulted_at = now();
1563        $this->number_of_views = $this->number_of_views + 1;
1564
1565        $this->save();
1566
1567        $this->timestamps = $timestamps;
1568    }
1569
1570    public function throwInactive()
1571    {
1572        if (! $this->is_active) {
1573            throw ValidationException::withMessages([
1574                trans('people.archived_contact_readonly'),
1575            ]);
1576        }
1577    }
1578
1579    /**
1580     * Get the prunable model query.
1581     *
1582     * @return \Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Builder
1583     * @codeCoverageIgnore
1584     */
1585    public function prunable()
1586    {
1587        return static::where('deleted_at', '<=', now()->subWeek());
1588    }
1589
1590    /**
1591     * Prepare the model for pruning.
1592     *
1593     * @return void
1594     * @codeCoverageIgnore
1595     */
1596    protected function pruning()
1597    {
1598        $this->deleteAvatars(true);
1599    }
1600}
